results.rendered_html:
avastu n. [kutsitārthe nañ]
1 A worthless thing or matter; avastunirbaṃdhapare kathaṃ nu te  Ku. 5. 66  intent on a bad object.
2 Unreality (of matter), insubstantiality; vastunyavastvāropo'jñānaṃ attribution of unreality;
— tā,
— tvaṃ unreality.
